reason: App wiring and sdk.System persistence fields live here; implementer needs current container/backend expectations.

Task requirements and chosen migration strategy: full LMDB switch, no BoltDB data migration.
Confirms upstream eventstore/lmdb exists in the pinned version and can replace boltdb without forking upstream.
